prompt: Create a dramatic vertical black-and-white fine-art photograph of a young woman with long windblown dark hair standing in a grassy field under a stormy cloudy sky, wearing a flowing off-the-shoulder black sheer gown. She is shown in left profile, waist-up to full-length, gently reaching her right hand up to touch the muzzle of a large black horse entering from the upper right side of the frame. The horse’s head and neck dominate the top-right composition, mane blowing in the wind, ears visible, eye partially in shadow, lowering its face toward the woman in an intimate quiet moment. The woman gazes upward at the horse with a calm, tender expression; her bare shoulders and soft posture create an elegant silhouette. Use a moody low-key monochrome palette with deep blacks, soft gray midtones, strong atmospheric contrast, and subtle film grain. Background should be out-of-focus open field and layered clouds, with no buildings, fences, text, or extra animals. Composition: vertical portrait orientation, subject placed slightly left of center, horse cropped by the right and top edges, lots of negative space in the cloudy sky, cinematic natural light, wind-swept romantic gothic mood, realistic photography, shallow depth of field, high detail in hair, fabric, and horse mane.
